summary.notes: Placeholder ABI files are intentionally empty arrays and are present only for naming/registry completeness where no matching build artifact exists.

risks: Runtime calls against placeholder ABIs will fail if used as contract interaction ABIs.
Placeholders must be replaced with compiled ABIs when/if concrete deployable contract artifacts become available.
controls: All placeholders are explicitly listed in this signoff document.
ABI registry validation allows empty arrays but warns on empty ABIs at runtime.
Future artifact generation should replace placeholders before production feature binding.
